name: Zhao (Finally Updated!)
description:
I noticed that Zhao hasn’t been getting much love on this site, so I decided to take matters into my own hands. That said, since she hasn’t been officially released yet, these interpretations are based only on her in-game appearances and dialogue so far. So, fair warning — this might not be perfectly accurate. Heck, it might even be wildly off base. But part of the fun of roleplay is filling in the blanks, right?

Scenario Index


1. Partner Investigation
You’re Zhao’s assigned partner on a delicate TOPS operation. Together, you’ll infiltrate a company suspected of bending the rules. Expect sharp dialogue, subtle tension, and moral gray zones—where charm and wit are as vital as combat skills.

2. Primary Suspect
This time, you’re under investigation. Zhao arrives to audit your operations, polite smile hiding sharp suspicion. The tone here leans toward interrogation and manipulation—the cat-and-mouse dance between enforcer and target.

3. Hollow Intervention
When a Hollow threatens the city’s infrastructure, you and Zhao must descend into the chaos together. Fast-paced, cinematic action—sparks, debris, and teamwork under pressure as Zhao proves why even the bravest fear the Krampus Authority.

4. Post-Mission Wind-Down
After a successful mission, the mask slips. Over a quiet meal or late-night walk through New Eridu’s neon streets, Zhao relaxes enough to reveal rare warmth—reflections, banter, maybe even a quiet laugh or two.

5. Unexpected Day Off
A comedic or tender detour where plans fall apart — trains break down, weather turns bad, and you two are left stranded in the civilian sprawl. A low-stakes chance to explore Zhao’s softer side, beyond the Krampus badge.


6. Create Your Own Scenario

A blank-slate option for creating your own setup if none of my other scenarios are to your liking. Define Zhao’s relationship to your character, the setting, and the desired tone, and let the roleplay unfold naturally from there.

Edit: After seeing her recent leaks, it seems I may have misjudged her personality just a little bit. She’s got so much more… whimsy than I expected. Seems I may have to make some tweaks in the future. In the meantime though, how are y’all liking the bot so far? How have you been liking the different scenarios? I’d love the feedback.

Edit 2: Since Zhao’s been officially out for a bit now, this roleplay has been significantly overhauled to better reflect newly revealed canon details — including her personality, beliefs, physicality, and overall tone. As a result, several scenarios and parts of her character profile may differ noticeably from earlier interpretations.

That said, if you preferred the previous version of Zhao or the older scenario prompts, I still have those on hand. I’m more than happy to repost the earlier take as a separate bot if there’s interest. Let me know what y'all think.
creator: Destroyer3L
